title: diodia maritima var. commutata
intro: Diodia maritima var. commutata, commonly known as sea blite or marsh button, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as aiding in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Diodia maritima var. commutata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
